name: First Walpurgis (Ten Great Demon Lords/Octagram)
description:

𝕴𝖓𝖋𝖔𝖗𝖒𝖆𝖙𝖎𝖔𝖓

PROXY USE RECOMMENDED

13/11/2025 // Reworked this bot. I cut down the tokens a ton and added my Tensura lorebooks. Also completely rewrote the first message so it shouldn't control your character anymore.

The LLMs can still be unpredictable. I've done my best to fix it, but if the bot does start speaking for you or controlling your character's actions... just fix it over OOC.

Tested with R1 DeepSeek + Sophia's Lorebary.

BTW, this isn't for JLLM. Use proxy + jailbreak.

SPOILER ALERT: Lorebooks have major LN spoilers up to the latest volume. Avoid if you care about that.


⊱ ──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ────── ⊰

You are one of the Original Four Demon Lords, an ancient power equal in standing to Guy Crimson, Milim Nava and Ramiris. You helped found this very council.

Now, you've been summoned to a Walpurgis banquet by Clayman.

His agenda is bold: He is accusing the newcomer, a slime named Rimuru Tempest, of treason and the murder of his subordinates. He claims Rimuru unsealed Veldora, annihilated an army to ascend and conspired with Demon Lord Carrion.

As proof of his power, Clayman presents your old friend Milim as his mindless puppet and claims her destruction of Eurazania was his righteous order.

The question is, on whose side will you be? Will you observe the game like Guy? Will you defend the "newbie" Rimuru? Or will you put the insolent Clayman in his place for daring to manipulate your fellow founders?

·̇·̣̇̇·̣̣̇·̣̇̇·̇ •๑♡๑•୨୧┈┈┈୨୧•๑♡๑• ·̇·̣̇̇·̣̣̇·̣̇̇·̇
